title: Password Reset War Room
text:
## Password Reset War Room

**Incident:** {number} users forgot passwords after the {adjective} holiday weekend.

**Symptoms:** Login screen says {silly word}, MFA app makes a {sound}, and one {job} cannot {verb} payroll.

**Current workaround:** Ask users to {verb} {adverb}, then stop storing passwords under a {color} {object}.

**Escalation:** If the account belongs to {person}, notify the {adjective} admin near {place}.

**Root cause theory:** Too many {plural noun} and not enough {food}.

**Status:** {emotion} but improving.
